skill.name: using-email-templates
skill.description: Use when creating or sending Mailtrap-hosted email templates, Handlebars personalization, template UUID in API payloads, or debugging variables and preview. Use when separating email design from application code for transactional or bulk sends.
skill.summary: Guides creation, sending, and debugging of Mailtrap email templates with Handlebars personalization.
skill.author: mailtrap

security_audit.summary: This is a pure documentation skill containing a single SKILL.md file. All static findings are false positives. The 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' detections (34 instances) are markdown code spans and one legitimate curl example. The 'Hardcoded URL' detections (20 instances) are official Mailtrap documentation and API endpoints. The 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' findings at lines 3 and 6 are YAML frontmatter, not code. The 'Email sending capability' is the intended documented functionality. No executable code, no data exfiltration, and no obfuscation patterns were found.

content.user_title: Send Mailtrap emails with template UUIDs and Handlebars variables
content.value_statement: Email teams waste time switching between docs and code to assemble template UUIDs and variable payloads. This skill gives Claude and Codex the exact Mailtrap API patterns so they generate correct send requests on the first try.
actual_capabilities: Generate correct API request bodies using template_uuid and template_variables fields for transactional and bulk streams
Explain Handlebars syntax including conditionals, loops, escaped versus raw HTML output, and nested paths
Reference official Mailtrap SDKs (Node.js, Python, PHP, Ruby, Java, .NET, CLI) with current repo links
Identify and fix common mistakes like mixing text/html fields with template_uuid in the same payload
Guide template creation in the Mailtrap UI and integration snippet location under each template's Integration tab
Recommend sandbox preview and testing workflows before sending to live recipients
limitations: Does not create or host the email templates themselves, only guides how to use templates that exist in Mailtrap
Cannot validate that a specific template_uuid exists, the developer must copy it from the Mailtrap UI
Does not store or manage API tokens, authentication is delegated to the authorizing-api-requests skill
Requires current SDK or API docs to be reviewed before generating code, because method signatures may change between releases

use_cases.title: Send a welcome email with personalized name
use_cases.description: A backend developer wires a signup confirmation email by passing the template UUID and a template_variables object with the user's name to the Mailtrap send API.

use_cases.title: Migrate transactional emails to Mailtrap templates
use_cases.description: A team lead moves hardcoded HTML email bodies out of the codebase into Mailtrap templates and needs the correct API payload shape for each stream.

use_cases.title: Debug why template variables are not rendering
use_cases.description: A marketing operations specialist uses the skill to verify Handlebars variable names, escaping behavior, and falsy value handling when preview output looks wrong.

prompt_templates.title: Generate a template send request
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a curl command to send a transactional email using my Mailtrap template with UUID abc123. The recipient is user@example.com and the template variable user_name should be Jane.
prompt_templates.scenario: First time using a Mailtrap template

prompt_templates.title: Convert inline HTML to a template payload
prompt_templates.prompt: I currently send emails with inline html and subject fields. Show me the equivalent request body using template_uuid and template_variables for the bulk stream.
prompt_templates.scenario: Migrating from raw HTML to templates

prompt_templates.title: Add Handlebars conditionals to a template
prompt_templates.prompt: My Mailtrap template needs to show a discount block only when the user has a coupon. Write the Handlebars syntax for that conditional and explain the falsy value rules.

prompt_templates.title: Bulk send with per-recipient variables
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to send a bulk email campaign through Mailtrap with 3 recipients, each with a different name and order_id. Show the API request body and explain how template_variables is resolved per recipient.

output_examples.input: How do I send a template email to one recipient with a user_name variable?
output: Use the EmailFromTemplate request shape on the transactional stream
Set template_uuid to the value from the template Integration tab
Pass template_variables as a JSON object with keys matching the Handlebars variables
Preview first using the sandbox before sending to the live stream

output_examples.input: What is the difference between {{name}} and {{{html}}} in Handlebars?
output: {{name}} outputs HTML-escaped content, safe for user-supplied text
{{{html}}} outputs raw HTML, use only for trusted content you control
Choose escaped output by default to prevent rendering issues and XSS in email clients

best_practices: Always preview template renders in the Mailtrap sandbox before sending to real recipients
Store the API token in an environment variable and reference it as $MAILTRAP_API_TOKEN in requests
Keep variable names in template_variables in sync with the Handlebars placeholders in the template
Use the correct stream host for transactional versus bulk sends, they are not interchangeable
anti_patterns: Do not mix text and html fields with template_uuid in the same request body, pick one approach per send
Do not hardcode API tokens in source code, shell history, or committed scripts
Do not use {{{html}}} for user-supplied content, it bypasses escaping and can break email rendering

faq.question: Where do I find the template_uuid?
faq.answer: Open the template in the Mailtrap app and look in the Integration tab. The UUID is shown there along with stream-specific code snippets.

faq.question: Can I use the same template for transactional and bulk sends?
faq.answer: Yes, the same template works on both streams. Choose the stream at integration time by using send.api.mailtrap.io or bulk.api.mailtrap.io.

faq.question: How do I test a template without sending to real recipients?
faq.answer: Use the Mailtrap sandbox and the testing-with-sandbox skill. The sandbox captures the rendered email so you can inspect variable resolution and HTML output.

faq.question: What Handlebars features are supported?
faq.answer: Escaped and raw output, conditionals, unless blocks, each loops, with blocks, and nested paths. Full reference is in the Mailtrap Handlebars documentation.

faq.question: Why is my template variable not rendering?
faq.answer: Check that the key in template_variables exactly matches the Handlebars placeholder name. Also confirm the value is not a falsy value that suppresses the block, such as an empty string or 0.

faq.question: Does this skill generate the email HTML for me?
faq.answer: It can guide you to ask for template HTML when creating a new template. The output should be a mobile-compatible email template, not generic web HTML.
